basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 17 April 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Sciences (NET/GATE preferable), M.E/M.Tech.
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Physics/ Chemistry/ Material Science/ Nanoscience/ Applied Sciences with NET/ GATE preferable or Post Graduate degree (M.E/M.Tech.) in Solar Energy/ Nanoscience & Technology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 14 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant role, candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Physics, Chemistry, Material Science, Nanoscience, or Applied Sciences, with a preference for NET/GATE qualifications. Alternatively, a Post Graduate degree (M.E/M.Tech.) in Solar Energy or Nanoscience & Technology is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment. This makes the application process more accessible to a wider range of candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month. This is a contractual position, and the salary is fixed for the duration of the contract.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Anna University has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive. This is a single opening, so interested candidates should ensure they meet all the eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and submit it via Speed Post or Registered Post to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at Anna University will primarily involve an interview. Candidates who are shortlisted based on their qualifications and application will be called for an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the Anna University website. Links to the official notification PDF and the application portal are usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of recruitment articles.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at Anna University is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure, as specified in the appointment letter and the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, at Anna University. Candidates applying for this position should be prepared to work at the specified location.
